Sitobolium tenerum, also known as Nervous Hound's Tongue, is a species of flowering plant in the borage family (Boraginaceae). The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The bioactive constituents of Sitobolium tenerum include flavonoids, alkaloids, and other phytochemicals that contribute to its medicinal properties. Traditional herbal preparations made with this plant are not well-documented, but it may be used in infusions or tinctures to support overall health and well-being.
